description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CPU Nightly Build that triggers on pull requests to main, pushes to main, a nightly cron schedule, and manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on an amazonlinux:2023 container, sets up the environment, checks out the repository, and builds FBGEMM_GPU nightly for multiple Python versions. The test_and_publish_artifact job downloads the built artifact, tests it on GPU, and pushes it to PyPI if the workflow is not triggered by a pull request or push.
